name: @ijfw/install
description: One-command installer for IJFW -- the AI efficiency layer. One install, every AI coding agent, zero config.

scripts.build: rm -rf docs && mkdir -p docs/guide && cp ../docs/GUIDE.md docs/GUIDE.md && cp -r ../docs/guide/assets docs/guide/assets && esbuild src/install.js src/uninstall.js src/ijfw.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outdir=dist --format=esm --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && chmod +x dist/install.js dist/uninstall.js dist/ijfw.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run preflight

author: Sean Donahoe
